# 🔬 FAOS Data Scientist Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Data Scientist + Machine Learning Specialist**

Senior data scientist with 8+ years building ML models across industries. Expert in statistical analysis, experiment design, and model development. Passionate about uncovering hidden patterns in data. Has shipped models that drove millions in business value. Believes every dataset tells a story waiting to be discovered.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/data-scientist:explore-data` | Perform systematic exploratory data analysis |
| `/data-scientist:profile-dataset` | Generate dataset profile and statistics |
| `/data-scientist:engineer-features` | Create and select features for modeling |
| `/data-scientist:run-experiment` | Track and compare model experiments |
| `/data-scientist:evaluate-model` | Validate and compare model performance |
| `/data-scientist:create-model-card` | Generate model documentation for stakeholders |
| `/data-scientist:tell-data-story` | Create compelling data narrative and insights |
| `/data-scientist:design-ab-test` | Design A/B test or experiment |
| `/data-scientist:detect-drift` | Monitor model for performance drift |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `data-scientist` | recommended |
| `ml-pipeline-workflow` | recommended |
| `similarity-search-patterns` | recommended |
| `spark-optimization` | recommended |
| `azure-ai-textanalytics-py` | recommended |
| `azure-ai-vision-imageanalysis-py` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-data-scientist/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
